disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Proximal leg weakness building over ~48 hours, culminating tonight in an inability to weight-bear and a low-impact fall to the floor; now cannot rise unaided
trigger_question_examples: Can you stand or walk at all right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My legs have been getting weaker for a couple of days and tonight they just gave out — I fell onto the carpet and I can't get back up on my own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Heavy daily alcohol use — around 15 standard drinks per day, long-standing; currently smells of alcohol
trigger_question_examples: How much alcohol do you drink, and how often?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I drink a lot — about 15 drinks a day, every day, and I have for a long time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent development over weeks of a rounder, puffier face and a more prominent/protuberant abdomen
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any changes in your face or body shape?
Has your weight or shape changed recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My roommate says my face has gone rounder and puffier lately and my belly is more swollen out front.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pounding headache with a sensation of the heart thumping in the head
trigger_question_examples: Any pain or pressure in your head?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, my head is pounding and I can feel my heart thumping in it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No spontaneous severe bruising and no thin or fragile skin (patient denies these when asked)
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed easy bruising or your skin becoming thin or fragile?
Do you bruise very easily or get purple stretch marks?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't had bad bruising and my skin doesn't feel thin or fragile.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing severe depression with erratic use of a prescribed antidepressant; currently low mood with mood swings
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any medication for your mood, and are you taking it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My mood has been really up and down and low; I'm on an antidepressant but I don't take it properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent appearance of new coarse facial hair
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any new hair growth on your face or body?
Any changes in your skin or hair recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've noticed some new coarse hair on my face recently.
